textByHash.715628558ac48805817c63ce68b0d4aa377cb012: Good day and welcome back to Al Kharid.
textByHash.60e396476f8a6f99a0bb050c00dfdb5f21c22181: My name is Ali Morrisane - the greatest salesman in the world.
textByHash.22818b6e8e196d04693f97049e038e05d14ef2d0: Well one can only do and sell so much. If I had more staff I'd be able to sell more, rather than wasting my time on menial things. I could get on with selling sand to the Bedabin and useless tourist trinkets to just about
textByHash.92dda48028057e92f7cb0f1c818c07dea848d5a4: No problem my friend, perhaps another time.
textByHash.2dd5ef6de0e6c6879aaade8f2606c3dff3aebd5b: Anyway, have a look at my wares.
textByHash.c9257a96dd45ab5d43c5f035334332e8e714b392: Yes, I know, I know - the life of a shop keeper isn't slaying dragons and wooing damsels, but it has its charms.
textByHash.dfb164952749f251e35e2280fbad78483bec692d: Although perhaps you can help me some other way. A nephew of mine lives not too far from here in a little town called Pollnivneach. He was supposed to become my assistant, but he hasn't shown up. If you fetch him
textByHash.b266dd9dc496656eaae1b0838bce3158c5a3bbf4: here I'll give you the first month of his salary!
textByHash.48fd30895dff8d116f90fd2a04ee93b5f5ddb944: Ah, many thanks, my friend. My nephew's name is Ali and he lives to the south in a town called Pollnivneach.
textByHash.9efdbee9ffea22e98175a266fd308f19a0aba793: Tell him his uncle Ali M needs his help up in Al Kharid.
textByHash.e8528d8fec209a7572e7c4ecb0c931944a19d4a8: And while you're here, have a look at my wares.
textByHash.453a6d273d0303ba22f9d82d703134c6c15d688a: I sent you to learn the whereabouts of my nephew, Ali. Is there any word of him in Pollnivneach?
textByHash.aee25ad067ed61d545cf364b859a29750a092b1f: That's not really the news I was hoping for.
textByHash.c9b14d5bf4cbd80fd350bcc077e76993de893e7b: But since you've been gone trade has gotten even busier. Will you have a look at my wares?
textByHash.991095ad726d77d2328673d5e63869ea407ed7a5: Hello again my friend. I have heard nothing from my troublesome nephew. Have you any news of his whereabouts?
textByHash.f67807e32f6d358cfc476998a4c5cd6a790b32eb: Well then please, tell me what has become of him. Nothing bad I hope.
textByHash.127926477f009326a84fbffbf4f0d140e6eb95f9: You make an old man very happy. I'm so proud of young Baba.
textByHash.e95c1968ac4425c95a0f7987727d1c4d3b9c73c3: Yes, by people with too much money and not enough sense. All willingly parted with their money and received what they purchased.
textByHash.a09ff3e999dca58d03bb00d00697d02351b55afe: Well, it seems I still am in need of an assistant...
textByHash.8f33cd96eba4f9b9e651c53106910fad70e0489a: My my, you surprise me, you're not as dumb as you look.
textByHash.4d6af1a2a127b1f9bc54341ff1e67ecdf086a7f0: Ah, once again you underestimate me. I sold you far more than that.
textByHash.226fb9e5f40416a703ff28bd2c84b106866897ff: I like the word 'tourism'. Did you not enjoy your stay in Pollnivneach? Was there not action, intrigue and fun to be had, and did you not notice all the other tourists there too?
textByHash.adfce23bf75797629aed255927a2dad3352ee393: Now that we both agree on that, may I show you my wares?
textByHash.af2c3352b0bc7a453e8223d2ec57322a88c36826: Hello, my friend. Have a look at my wares.
textByHash.8ce8ab45054a9f7e2aa49056429357fbf9ae72e3: Hang on a second while I get my stock of blackjacks out.
textByHash.9572c69a1cb73597b798c89ca952e9a9c161fa4a: Hang on a second while I get the garments.
textByHash.2a3cdee7bb80564e931599ee6e4d20598e0ab0f6: Well at the moment I don't exactly have a selection of runes.
textByHash.6844e70cf3988fc70ee7fb79a9f2104495cd0c5f: Those boxes from your friend Aubury have a very odd locking mechanism.
textByHash.01bdf7e1ca82ae07687f66dc31fa7e2dd2fd6832: What I mean by 'not exactly' is 'no, I haven't managed to get the lock off'.
textByHash.3a004297ac6035695b3c2deb382611c254ce1ae3: I was kind of hoping that you would have a look at them. There are two distinctive types of caskets one with a simple locking mechanism and another, which ummm... looks a little tricky to say the least.
textByHash.a567e9a798c2120aa838153a584261e1571d01c3: Of course, my friend. Any good salesman ought to take the opportunities that present themselves.
textByHash.679f651d557f38143a6560bc43e5ac6a04376fc2: A good businessman looks for all the opportunities he can.
textByHash.22a5efd8f3a878af1176670d5ce3fec4e429be35: Well, these associates of my nephew can be somewhat... overenthusiastic.
textByHash.2bf0febf88eaa909382ed663e4d62bbfced53b0f: I'm sure they'll settle down soon.
textByHash.4a53e0453426fc08dbab56ba59c23f874dd741a3: Well, there's a simple solution there, don't you agree?
textByHash.6c3d89120fe0ff0f0df1fbe454a647dc84077581: It's a step in the right direction.
textByHash.91358e48d53d6b854c121445b1cf1dec13045460: Now, would you like to have a look at my wares?
textByHash.2f4fa79d5b92383e5c2f600b5e26daa313fac6fa: They can continue running their gliders into trees, and I'll keep my business going. Sooner or later it'll all work out in my favour.
textByHash.63e2b33894d11227df0667a5043d85455cd85960: Anyway, before you go, take a look at my wares.
textByHash.f1150c1f4e262b27d888ac7081e1710fde2ab875: Before you go, have a look at my wares.
textByHash.b7377c512671cf6c1d4d82c90c87d7afcb4444b8: Oh! Unfortunately it seems to have expired yesterday!
textByHash.2eec85416985c50947bdf3a9c22169c048847410: I'm sorry, there's nothing I can do.
textByHash.f370ef5b726895d8cbf17408dc9bf6cac4c351b6: Look, I had those printed to win over the local traders. They weren't too pleased with the money off voucher, but I promised them I would repay their losses.
textByHash.0947dd35cf983f249916e6d027e81a34444ac21a: I don't know what you mean...
textByHash.d93802549aaa230a0821bd03e48096f58187bcd2: Anyway, it would be a shame for you to leave without looking at my wares.
textByHash.f6713e1daca5a3d91ec5631b9dc58bcad6b6bbda: For you, always. As a matter of fact I have just acquired a fleet of magic carpets, which operate throughout the Kharidian desert.
textByHash.8b7cb8119ac8dcd4cac8dc3db95d95718ab82577: Trade is good, but I would like to expand and diversify, but it's proving a little more difficult than I initially thought.
textByHash.b405e0927d5f14b6ae383a15c842415bb8269920: I think the other merchants in this town are conspiring against me.
textByHash.927a9e0fd150f13833afe20b6facff07463fd15a: Well maybe I can't get any new suppliers then because I'm Pollnivnian.
textByHash.bda23242dd43674efea463b47402e9286a61e05d: My friend in Sophanem... Ahh never mind him, maybe we might have a look at him another time.
textByHash.e19a5472c6d603958c4fd0b657c35d9effe0ca8a: There's a blackjack seller in Pollnivneach, a cautious type of guy, not the usual entrepreneurial sort that I would normally deal with, but...
textByHash.c7f58f85abc54009ccd35935cb1765f34908e406: I think that he has a product with real potential...
textByHash.ac0ba170e60487ea5c77eaba0564307b7666d77c: Yes, but at the moment the product isn't polished enough, if you could convince him to create a larger variety of weapon I would gladly stock his products.
textByHash.beb419d29e794232375142cf89870182f5bb0919: I thought you wanted to help.
textByHash.06b6c1645544618e83a2c0726352f721e7609006: You get access to more products. Is that not reward enough?
textByHash.13e74e6bf70d3cdb131630fd11df53b43943d29c: I'll tell you what then, how about I let you have discounted flights on my magic carpet rides?
textByHash.b9b73e90343f32a1e9980b28280cb8a5e542a7e6: Fair enough so, we have a win, win, win situation on our hands then.
textByHash.5776a8fc462a24f1e696046363ff72eb64428856: Didn't we also agree that you would get discounted travel on my magic carpet network?
textByHash.61ab6334224a915e6768033cf79396196f436343: Good, that's what I like to hear. Now where were we?
textByHash.b13bab45b40bdb75eb2bfdf9c393d261ea9ed2d7: Well you had better get going, you've a fair bit of travelling ahead of you. Unless you want to make a small purchase from me first?
textByHash.e6f58f58b9995a555bd641d825ea4dcc63276b3d: I have an old friend - a cloth merchant Siamun, who lives in Sophanem - Do you know the place?
textByHash.552a0d69804d5f7d0a6e4d696360db7a9a5a607b: That's the one, well if you could convince him to supply me with some of his merchandise, I would be more than willing to sell them to the masses ...... for a small percentage of course.
textByHash.b4c9c61c95beae4a64f8a141ccd7d25e26b3e31e: I think I need just one more product type, something magical ... now what could I stock that's magical, has large demand and a pretty good profit margin...
textByHash.537da5775a869bec5c1cd15e05da804fc98bc81d: Yes, that would be perfect, but who could I get that would supply? There really seems to be a gap in the market in the desert but I don't know anyone in that line of business.
textByHash.b0e104525f3d571d0b6ad3a2681f025cd38e7032: Oh yes, the rune seller from Varrock. That would be perfect. He's far enough away that he wouldn't end up competing with himself.
textByHash.b9bc67b7f1e08659da55dc9239d44943455ba7ab: Well the rune market is a limited one, if I were to sell his runes from a location nearby his shop, then I would take part of his market share so he would in fact not benefit from me selling runes.
textByHash.edb6c21ac6f15965d2946ba166fc247b358cf7ed: Well, I always fancied that I could be a great draper, but the way things are looking that's not about to happen any time soon.
textByHash.cd320eb00eeadadb65edf6aaf9774841c1af9d9d: I have a friend - well, actually more of an acquaintance - who lives in Sophanem, some way to the south of here, and who may be able to help. But, from what I've heard, no one can enter or leave the city.
textByHash.e147a00e025555341690f2164d9ad8d767b81a90: Is there any chance of getting you to look up a merchant to supply me?
textByHash.c8d09ac188b4169e47f5e15121707460688cde81: Go see Siamun in Sophanem about some clothes.
textByHash.7a6a9a0f721e2ba53d7d4b350e9ee5dca931b215: Could you talk to your friend Aubury in Varrock about supplying me with runes?
textByHash.2d23a1c1112079a2f82f877743b61ab0f9bdcc0d: Don't tarry there too long, I'm quite anxious to get a rune store open before anyone else in this area.
textByHash.279719deffe54ca16db4eb60ea400159dbd7bd0d: In Pollnivneach go and talk to the blackjack seller. Convince him to supply me with his produce.
textByHash.e54af36fc5df723c7b9198c405bf5be02c4e609c: You're a bright chap. I'm sure you'll work something out.
textByHash.76b9723a4c69827cb5a006e66edec842a30a7c5b: Good job on getting the rune shipments sorted. I'm just receiving the first of them. Though there seems to be a funny sort of locking mechanism on them, which I haven't completely figured out.
textByHash.426c197947c0d7a43beb7322e9d2fb5129b8ccd8: Fantastic job on the blackjacks. I started getting the first batches of them a short time ago, and they've being flying off the shelves, although the demand seems to be dropping off a little.
textByHash.c90a5c478e19603f108148bc861b56505c677cd7: No, no, they're still selling fine, but if you could perhaps convince the blackjack man to send a different variety the next time you see him, I would be more than happy.
textByHash.7877b5f4f78e214e9badaa4462cba2b1649f644e: Siamun's clothes seem to have really struck a chord with the locals in Al Kharid. Menaphite culture seems to be taking off here, rumour has it that one of Prince Ali's servants bought him one of Siamun's robes.
textByHash.95630e8f0ab1b2948f3eb7e9733af0d9c9158f97: Quite, if I don't say so myself. But in order to keep things fresh, the next time you're in Sophanem, could you ask that cranky old so-and-so Siamun to produce a new line of clothing?
textByHash.2bfd5157d6469bc50e8fe8197674e17e6b3e1ddb: , I would like to commend you on all the selfless help you have given me.
textByHash.cd73e198d1b46901618df0acdb234a0f4882b85d: I think you underestimate your efforts. Anyway, as a token of my gratitude I have told all my magic carpet attendants to allow you to travel on the carpets at a discounted rate.
